/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmotor_control_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libmotor_control_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/motor_control_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/motor_control_msgs/msg/dm_interface__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/loaf/Pinocchio_ws/build/motor_control_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmotor_control_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
